remaining_risks: Dockerfile does not embed local ASR bundles; Zeabur must mount /data and upload the two pinned model directories manually.
Old SQLite task rows created before these fixes may remain stuck in running state and are not evidence of current runtime health.
One targeted pytest case still fails because its InlineThread monkeypatch is incompatible with the current threading usage; this is a test harness issue, not a confirmed user-facing regression.
